name: real-limo-front
desc: DSLR photograph of a 28-year-old Chinese male programmer. Thin build, short messy black hair, black-framed rectangular glasses, wearing a blue-and-white plaid flannel shirt over a dark t-shirt. Tired expression with dark circles under eyes. Slight surprised expression. 3/4 front view, upper body. Real person, photorealistic, natural skin texture, soft studio lighting, neutral background. NOT a 3D render, NOT cartoon, NOT illustration, NOT anime.

name: real-office-night
desc: DSLR photograph of a dark open-plan tech company office at night. Only one desk lamp on, illuminating a single workstation with dual monitors showing blue-white code. Takeout boxes and coffee cup on desk. Other desks empty and dark. Real interior photograph, photorealistic, natural monitor glow lighting. NOT illustration, NOT 3D render.
